query: SELECT tc.id, tc.organizationId, tc.taskId, tc.sectionName, tc.completed, tc.notionLastEdited, tc.updatedAt FROM taskCompletion tc WHERE tc.notionLastEdited IS NULL ORDER BY tc.updatedAt DESC LIMIT 5
